name: Pick your own Heishou Pack | Family Hierach POV
description:
PROXY BOT!-USE PROXY FOR A BETTER EXPERIENCE!-

POV: Newest Family Hierarch (FIRST MULTI CHARACTER BOT- SORRY IF ITS SHIT)

You are the first and new Family Hierarch of Danguanyuan to not carry the Xianhuang worm. After your messy ritual night, you get to hold a leash of only ONE Heishou pack, which one shall you pick? Also, this version of H corp is the one that the sinners becoming the heishou pack, so uh, yeah (i hate making ocs for each branch)
creator: yggdrasil234
